content:
IVX HOLDINGS — FINAL RELEASE CANDIDATE (RC-1)

The backend blockers are complete.

Do not modify working backend modules unless verification proves a regression.

Complete ONLY the remaining blockers.

==================================================
TASK 1 — ANDROID PRODUCTION QA
==================================================

Install APK v1.4.3 on a real Android device.

Verify:

□ Install
□ Upgrade from previous version
□ Owner login
□ Member login
□ Feed
□ Chat
□ Image upload
□ Video upload
□ Reels
□ Push notifications
□ AI responses
□ Logout/login
□ App restart
□ Offline recovery
□ Crash monitoring

Return PASS/FAIL with screenshots and logs where available.

==================================================
TASK 2 — REALTIME VALIDATION
==================================================

Using the Android device:

Verify:

□ Live chat delivery
□ Read receipts
□ Typing indicator
□ Presence
□ Reconnect after network interruption
□ Push notification delivery
□ Message ordering
□ Duplicate prevention

If any test fails, fix it and redeploy.

==================================================
TASK 3 — IOS RELEASE VALIDATION
==================================================

Prepare the iOS build.

Verify:

□ Build succeeds
□ Login
□ Feed
□ Chat
□ Media upload
□ Notifications

Report any iOS-specific issues separately.

==================================================
TASK 4 — PRODUCTION VERIFICATION
==================================================

Confirm:

GitHub HEAD SHA =
Render Live SHA =
/version SHA

Verify:

□ /health = 200
□ /version matches deployed commit
□ AI Gateway operational
□ Supabase operational

==================================================
TASK 5 — OWNER ACCEPTANCE
==================================================

Produce a Release Candidate report containing only:

- APK version
- Commit SHA
- Deployment ID
- Live URL
- Android QA results
- iOS QA results
- Realtime QA results
- Remaining blockers (if any)

Do not create another audit.

If all tests pass, change the release status to:

🟢 PRODUCTION READY

If any test fails, identify the exact module, root cause, files affected, and corrective action before another release.
